ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sermons" (
  "sermon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sermon */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the sermon was delivered */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the sermon */,
  "sermon_series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sermon series it belongs to */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the speaker who delivered the sermon */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book of the Bible referenced in the sermon */,
  "chapter" TEXT /* Chapter of the book referenced in the sermon */,
  "scripture_references" TEXT /* Scripture references in the sermon */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to the video recording of the sermon */,
  "audio_url" TEXT /* URL to the audio recording of the sermon */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief summary of the sermon */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the sermon was delivered */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Relevant keywords associated with the sermon */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Length of the sermon in minutes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sermon was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sermon was last updated in the system */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the sermon has received */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads the sermon has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sermon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sermons_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sermons_sermon_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("sermon_series_id") REFERENCES sermon_series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sermons_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES bible_books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sermon_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sermon series */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sermon series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sermon series */,
  "church_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the church where the series is held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sermon series */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sermon series */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the sermon series */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the series */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the series was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the series was last updated in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sermon_series_church_id FOREIGN KEY ("church_id") REFERENCES churches ("church_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the speaker */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the speaker */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the speaker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the speaker */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the speaker */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the speaker */,
  "ministry" TEXT /* Ministry or organization of the speaker */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the speaker was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the speaker was last updated in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bible_books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book of the Bible */,
  "book_name" TEXT /* Name of the book */,
  "testament" TEXT /* Testament (Old or New) */,
  "chapters" INTEGER /* Number of chapters in the book */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Common abbreviation for the book */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the book was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the book was last updated in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "churches" (
  "church_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each church */,
  "church_name" TEXT /* Name of the church */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the church */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the church */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the church */,
  "denomination" TEXT /* Denomination of the church */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the church */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the church was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the church was last updated in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("church_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sermon_media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "sermon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sermon the media file belongs to */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., video, audio) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the media file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the media file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the media file was uploaded */,
  "media_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the media file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the media file was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the media file was last updated in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sermon_media_sermon_id FOREIGN KEY ("sermon_id") REFERENCES sermons ("sermon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pastor, researcher, admin) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "favorite_speakers" TEXT /* IDs of the user's favorite speakers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sermon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sermon being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sermon */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sermon was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user at the time of access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access event was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access event was last updated in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sermon_id FOREIGN KEY ("sermon_id") REFERENCES sermons ("sermon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sermon_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "sermon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sermon the note is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the note */,
  "note_title" TEXT /* Title of the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., question, comment) */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note or comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the note was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the note was last updated in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sermon_notes_sermon_id FOREIGN KEY ("sermon_id") REFERENCES sermons ("sermon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sermon_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sermon_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "sermon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sermon the rating is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_score" INTEGER /* Rating score (1-5) */,
  "rating_comment" TEXT /* Comment accompanying the rating */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was last updated in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sermon_ratings_sermon_id FOREIGN KEY ("sermon_id") REFERENCES sermons ("sermon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sermon_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sermon_series_media" (
  "series_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sermon series the media file belongs to */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., video, audio) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the media file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the media file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the media file was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the media file was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the media file was last updated in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sermon_series_media_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES sermon_series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sermon_series_notes" (
  "series_note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sermon series the note is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the note */,
  "note_title" TEXT /* Title of the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., question, comment) */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note or comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the note was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the note was last updated in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sermon_series_notes_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES sermon_series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sermon_series_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sermon_series_ratings" (
  "series_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sermon series the rating is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_score" INTEGER /* Rating score (1-5) */,
  "rating_comment" TEXT /* Comment accompanying the rating */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was last updated in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sermon_series_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sermon_series_ratings_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES sermon_series ("series_id")
)
